form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 2 lengths at Warragul over 400m (22.94) beating Bunni Bale in Grade 5 on April 14. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by 2 lengths at Warragul over 400m (22.94) beating Bunni Bale in Grade 5 on April 14. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Produced a good effort last start to finish sixth over 400m at Warragul, beaten 2 lengths (23.21) behind Snitch Adams in a Grade 5 on April 14. Racing well and has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Produced a good effort last start to finish sixth over 400m at Warragul, beaten 2 lengths (23.21) behind Snitch Adams in a Grade 5 on April 14. Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a 2.25 lengths third over 400m Warragul in 23.04. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a 2.25 lengths third over 400m Warragul in 23.04. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 435m at this track. Will be tested in this company.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 435m at this track. Will be tested in this company.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 2.25 lengths third (22.23) over 390m at Ballarat and making it two placings on end. Consistent performer from this draw. Top chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 2.25 lengths third (22.23) over 390m at Ballarat and making it two placings on end. Consistent performer from this draw. Top chance on best form.

form.formComment: Had been in consistent form with four minors on end before missing the frame last start when fourth (25.14) at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw and needs to bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been in consistent form with four minors on end before missing the frame last start when fourth (25.14) at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw and needs to bounce back.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 14 over 400m at Warragul in a Grade 4/5. Others read better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 14 over 400m at Warragul in a Grade 4/5. Others read better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th over 435m at this track beaten 9 lengths (25.07) behind Lakeview Mitch in a Grade 5 on April 12. Forward showing expected.
